title: So Let's Set The Ore On Fire
description: Adds correct ore-specific fire colors and respective blocks, so they can burn brighter than the sun.
body:
# So Let's Set The Ore On Fire
So Let's Set The Ore On Fire (name being a reference to the song [We Are Young](https://genius.com/Fun-we-are-young-lyrics) by Fun) is an attempt to be a vanilla-friendly mod that adds different fires depending on the material.

- Note: 26.2 releases were pulled after it turned out the common code wasn't bundled correctly. Sorry for the dilemma and when I can I'll send out a fixed jar.

![All the new fires](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a952675f2e05a7fe6c667e8ef27394b5fd54b93.jpeg)

In real life, there are [flame tests](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Flame_test) which suggest what elements could look like when on fire.

Currently, the mod adds fire, and its respective torches, lanterns and campfires for Redstone (red), Iron (gold/yellow), and Copper (blue-green).

Possibly in the future more materials can be added for other fire, in real life some things like Lapis lazuli/Lazulite would crack under fire, but maybe an exception could be made.
